title: CarryCtx Preset Manifest
description: Schema for CarryCtx Capability Packs (Presets) following a package.json style.

name.description: The unique name of the preset, typically lowercase with hyphens (e.g., carryctx-preset-rust-cli).

description.description: A short, readable description of the preset's purpose.

author.description: The author or organization publishing the preset.

license.description: The license of the preset (e.g., MIT).

engine.description: Semver range for the supported carryctx-cli version (e.g., >=0.2.0).

profiles.description: Agent capability profiles dictating review standards and output structures.

additionalProperties.description: Relative path to the profile markdown file (e.g., profiles/reviewer.md).

rules.description: List of relative paths to absolute project constraints and rules.

workflows.description: Standard Operating Procedures mapping intent to workflow files.

additionalProperties.description: Relative path to the workflow YAML/Markdown file.

skills.description: List of base carryctx skills this preset depends on.

activation.description: Conditions for automatically recommending or activating this preset.

filePatterns.description: Glob patterns indicating relevant project types (e.g., Cargo.toml).

intents.description: Task intents that should trigger this preset (e.g., implement, review).

permissions.description: Crucial supply-chain security constraints defining what this preset is allowed to do.

shell.description: Allowed shell commands the agent can execute autonomously (e.g., ['cargo', 'git']).

network.description: Allowed domains for external network access.
